questions.question: Explain the three cases for deletion in a BST with examples.
expectedPoints: Case 1: Node with no children - simply remove
Case 2: Node with one child - replace with child
Case 3: Node with two children - replace with inorder successor/predecessor

questions.question: Compare and contrast the time complexity of BST operations in balanced vs unbalanced trees, and explain strategies to maintain balance.
expectedPoints: Unbalanced BST: O(n) operations in worst case
Balancing techniques: AVL trees, Red-Black trees
Practical applications where balance is crucial
